question: In which countries does Agriculture GDP make up a disproportionately large share of total GDP (millions of $)?

analysis.chart_type: Horizontal Bar Chart: Top Countries by Agriculture Sector % of GDP
analysis.design_rationale: A horizontal bar chart showcasing countries sorted by 'Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution' clearly highlights those nations where agriculture forms a disproportionate share of the economy. This is effective given the categorical nature of 'Country/Economy' and the numeric percentage contributions, allowing for straightforward visual comparison. By directly mapping the percentage field, the visualization answers the question at a glance.
analysis.target_insight: Identifies and compares countries where agriculture makes up the largest proportion of GDP (in percentage terms), revealing nations most dependent on agriculture relative to their total economic output.

chart_encodings.other_aesthetics: Sort bars descending; highlight top 20 with color gradient for emphasis

transformations: Convert 'Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution' from string to float, stripping non-numeric characters and handling missing/invalid entries
Filter out rows where 'Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution' is null or zero
Sort DataFrame by 'Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution' descending
Select top 20 countries with highest 'Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution'
data_preparation_steps: df['Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution'] = pd.to_numeric(df['Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution'].str.replace('%','',regex=False), errors='coerce')
df = df.dropna(subset=['Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution'])
df = df[df['Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution']>0]
df_sorted = df.sort_values('Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution', ascending=False)
suggestion.matplotlib_code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib as mpl
df = pd.read_csv('csv_c_squared\1.csv')
df['Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution'] = pd.to_numeric(df['Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution'].str.replace('%','',regex=False), errors='coerce')
df = df.dropna(subset=['Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution'])
df = df[df['Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution'] > 0]
df_sorted = df.sort_values('Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution', ascending=False)
df_top = df_sorted.head(20)
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10,8))
cmap = mpl.colormaps['viridis']
norm = mpl.colors.Normalize(vmin=df_top['Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution'].min(), vmax=df_top['Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution'].max())
colors = cmap(norm(df_top['Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution']))
y = np.arange(len(df_top))
ax.barh(y, df_top['Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution'], color=colors)
ax.set_yticks(y)
ax.set_yticklabels(df_top['Country/Economy'])
ax.invert_yaxis()
ax.set_xlabel('Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution (%)')
ax.set_ylabel('Country/Economy')
plt.title('Top 20 Countries by Percentage of GDP from Agriculture\n(Disproportionate Agricultural Economies)')
sm = plt.cm.ScalarMappable(cmap=cmap, norm=norm)
sm.set_array([])
cbar = plt.colorbar(sm, ax=ax, orientation='vertical', label='Agriculture Sector GDP of % Contribution (%)')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
